task_objective: Add smaller helper descriptions under QAM toggles and remove unwanted horizontal separator lines from compact QAM rows.
design_decisions: Use Decky's native ToggleField description prop for helper text instead of custom toggle wrappers.
Use Decky's native bottomSeparator="none" prop on affected item controls to suppress visible row divider lines.
Keep existing focus behavior, full-width toggle wrappers, panel ordering, and notification settings semantics unchanged.
results: Focused frontend static tests passed after red-green implementation.
Full Python test suite passed with 217 tests.
TypeScript typecheck, Ruff, ty, Rollup build, and frontend supply-chain verification passed.
Frontend supply-chain verification required network escalation after sandbox DNS failed with EAI_AGAIN.
